nasb.text: Therefore I speak to them in parables; because while seeing they do not see, and while hearing they do not hear, nor do they understand.

esv.text: This is why I speak to them in parables, because seeing they do not see, and hearing they do not hear, nor do they understand.

cnv.text: 因此，我用比喻對他們講話，因為他們看卻看不見，聽也聽不到，也不明白。

ccb.text: 我用比喻教导他们是因为他们视而不见，听而不闻，闻而不悟。

csbs.text: 我之所以用比喻对他们说，是因为他们虽然看了，却看不见；听了，却听不进，也不领悟。
